description: As an agricultural climatologist for the IGAD Climate Prediction and Applications Centre (ICPAC), document the East African rainfall climatology based on the request at ~/Desktop/east_africa_rainfall_request.txt. Using NASA Panoply and the NCEP precipitation data (~/PanoplyData/prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc), export a geo-mapped plot for April to ~/Documents/EastAfricaRainfall/precip_map_april.png and a 1D line plot of the 12-month annual cycle for an equatorial East African grid point near 0°N, 37.5°E to ~/Documents/EastAfricaRainfall/annual_cycle_lineplot.png. Create a structured report at rainfall_assessment.txt identifying the observed rainfall pattern and its peak months.
